title: NDP tables bill to increase minimum wage in Alberta; province has lowest in Canada
author: Mrinali Anchan
notes: NDP Bill 201 tables $1/yr increase for 3 years reaching $18 by Oct 2027. Key fact: 'Alberta is the only province that has not boosted its minimum wage since 2018, with its $15-per-hour rate becoming the lowest in Canada' after 5 provinces raised theirs Oct 1 2025. Also: NDP proposes eliminating youth minimum wage differential. Anchors EVT-069.
